# AspireAI Memory Bank Templates

These files provide optional context notes for longer-running work. Update them only when maintainers request persistent memory tracking.

## Files
- `projectbrief.md` – Capture high-level goals, stakeholders, and constraints.
- `activeContext.md` – Note current focus areas, recent changes, and open questions.
- `progress.md` – Track what is working today and items that still need attention.
- `productContext.md` – Summarize user value, target personas, and success metrics.
- `systemPatterns.md` – Document architectural decisions and service relationships.
- `techContext.md` – Record technology stack, tooling, and environment requirements.

## Usage
1. Confirm that the user wants a persistent memory log before editing any file here.
2. Keep entries dated and concise (bullet lists preferred) and update the `Last reviewed` line whenever edits are made.
3. Append new updates as a fresh dated section directly under the `Last reviewed` line; do not overwrite previous history, and shift earlier sections downward so the newest context stays at the top.
3. Archive outdated content by moving older sections to a dated block at the bottom of each file.
4. When the memory bank is no longer needed, clear contents but keep the structure in place.
